allow: PowerShell(npm install clsx tailwind-merge class-variance-authority tailwindcss-animate "@radix-ui/react-slot" lucide-react)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; "killed PID $_" } catch {} }; "port 3000 cleared")
